items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 2 (about 135-150 bpm). Include a 10-minute warm-up and a 5-minute cool down.

items.title: Speed Work
items.description: Perform 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:00 min/km with 2 minutes of rest between each interval. Start with a 10-minute warm-up and finish with a 10-minute cool down. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 4 (about 160-175 bpm) during the intervals.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 4 km at a relaxed pace of 7:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate in Zone 1 (about 120-130 bpm). This session should feel easy and help you recover from previous workouts.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Continue with weight training focusing on full-body exercises. Aim for 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise, including squats, lunges, and deadlifts. Rest for 60 seconds between sets.
